creator: rmgls@free.fr
text:
Hi Robert,

On Sun, 27 Jan 2008 12:57:58 GMT rwatson@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: [wpa] wpa_supplicant doesn't associates when the AP is hidden
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=118203

Thanks for your email, but Sam,  suggested the solution:
in my wpa_supplicant:
	=== === ===
	scan_ssid=1
	=== === ===
	...
the only thing needed is a word in the doc to help on this topic (hidden ap).

Really, many thanks for your efforts, maintaining and developping FreeBSD,
(I run FreeBSD since 2000).

Best regards

Raouul Mégélas
rmgls@free.fr
